lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of regular wear on the interior and exterior but is in reliable running order and has been well-maintained.
The vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior and interior show heavy wear and major cosmetic damage.

Looking for a dependable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is a solid choice! It’s in fair condition, showing some honest character and typical wear from its years on the road, but it remains a reliable companion ready for its next adventure. A great opportunity to own a quality model at a budget-friendly price!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver for those prioritizing function over aesthetics. While it remains mechanically sound and runs well, it shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with several noticeable scratches along the side panels and a small dent on the rear fender. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows wear, including some fraying on the driver’s seat upholstery and minor staining on the floor mats. It has been regularly serviced, though a potential buyer should expect to replace the tires within the next few thousand miles. This is a solid, honest car that is ready for the road, provided you don't mind a few cosmetic imperfections.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior looks great, though there are a few small rock chips on the hood and a minor scuff on the rear bumper. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is sound, with all features functioning as expected and a documented maintenance history. It offers a solid balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal for a pre-owned vehicle.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean history and robust mechanical specifications, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. Our team has thoroughly inspected this unit to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic presentation. Secure a premium automotive asset that delivers consistent value and uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s been really well-loved and runs like a dream—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. It’s got a few tiny signs of life here and there, but it’s super solid and ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. This driver-focused example is equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock for optimal torque transfer. Key preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a reinforced rear subframe and a VANOS system refresh to ensure timing precision. The suspension retains its factory-tuned damping characteristics, providing the signature communicative feedback through the rack-and-pinion steering. The exterior shows well, reflecting consistent care, while the powertrain maintains a linear power delivery and robust compression across all cylinders. A reliable, high-performance icon ready for the open road.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Title in hand. Reliable daily driver.

Up for sale is a meticulously cared-for 2018 Lexus RX 350 in a sophisticated Deep Blue Mica. This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility. The exterior paint retains a high gloss, with only minor stone chips consistent with light highway use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort, featuring pristine parchment leather seats, genuine wood trim, and a fully functional suite of technology including navigation and a premium surround-sound system. Mechanically, it is in excellent working order, having undergone regular oil changes and a recent brake service. The 3.5L V6 engine runs smoothly and delivers the quiet, refined ride Lexus is known for. With a clean title and a comprehensive maintenance log, this SUV is a reliable choice for anyone seeking a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This exceptional vehicle exemplifies a refined balance of performance and enduring value. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it offers a sophisticated driving experience tailored for the discerning professional. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, this model stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and reliable service.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this automobile balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional long-term value.

Hi friends! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and she’s looking for a brand new adventure! This car has been so good to me—it's in great shape, super dependable, and ready to hit the road today. It’s been well-maintained and still has so much life left in it. I’d love for it to go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a mechanically sorted 2004 E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example benefits from a comprehensive preventative maintenance suite, including addressed rod bearings and a refreshed VANOS system. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. The suspension geometry remains tight with recent bushing replacements, and the subframe has been proactively reinforced. While showing light patina consistent with a well-enjoyed driver, the compression remains strong across all cylinders and the throttle response is razor-sharp. A true driver's spec for those prioritizing mechanical integrity and analog engagement.
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs well.
Up for sale is a well-cared-for 2018 Audi S5 Sportback in Mythos Black Metallic.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this vehicle stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and responsible ownership. We invite you to experience the refined driving dynamics and enduring value of this exceptional pre-owned offering.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. With a well-documented service history and a refined presentation, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking both value and excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride that's been so good to me over the years. It's in great shape and absolutely ready for its next big adventure with a new owner! Whether you're just commuting to work or planning a fun weekend road trip, this car handles beautifully and is super comfortable. I've taken really good care of it, and I'd love to see it go to a great home. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. Power is delivered through a precise six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-Differential Lock. The chassis benefits from a reinforced rear subframe and updated bushings, maintaining the legendary 50/50 weight distribution and sharp turn-in response. Recent preventative maintenance includes a valve adjustment and rod bearing service, ensuring the internal combustion vitals are within spec for its next owner. A mechanically sound, honest performance machine for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, striking a perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections typical of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring leather upholstery that has been regularly conditioned and electronics that remain fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; I have strictly followed the manufacturer’s service schedule, including a recent oil change, brake pad replacement, and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. It handles with precision and offers a smooth, quiet ride without any mechanical concerns. Complete service records and both original key fobs are included, providing peace of mind for the next owner who seeks a reliable, well-cared-for premium vehicle.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical reliability and consistent performance. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal, this unit offers a sophisticated driving experience. Its history of regular servicing guarantees continued dependability, making it a premier choice for those seeking professional-grade quality and enduring value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, the automobile has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and road-ready performance. Offering a sophisticated balance of luxury and utility, this model stands as a testament to enduring quality and engineering excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable set of wheels that still looks and feels great on the road. It’s ready for its next big adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) is a mechanically sorted example featuring the 3.6L M96 flat-six with VarioCam Plus, producing a linear 320hp. It features the desirable G96 6-speed manual transaxle and a documented IMS bearing retrofit. The suspension geometry remains true, utilizing original Bilstein struts and refreshed control arm bushings for sharp turn-in. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver, the engine exhibits strong compression and a dry undercarriage with a recently replaced rear main seal (RMS). A visceral, analog machine ready for the canyons.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Maintenance up to date. Clean title.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive mechanical and aesthetic shape. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, with only minor, age-appropriate stone chips on the forward-facing surfaces that do not detract from its overall presence. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the seating surfaces are supple with no tears, and every electronic component—from the infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is solid, featuring a responsive engine and a transmission that shifts smoothly through every gear. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a full history of records included. Recent updates include a fresh set of all-season tires and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring it is road-ready for its next owner. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. A distinguished addition to any collection, prepared for immediate acquisition.
